archetype: 1 (Organic & Earthy) - Modified for Government Trust (Deep Green Palette)
emotion_and_tone: Trustworthy, authoritative yet accessible, clean, and secure.

typography.rules: Never use Inter for headings. Keep headings tight and authoritative. Use generous line-height for body to ensure legibility in multiple languages (Uzbek/Russian/English).

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Optical clarity over geometry. Use generous padding inside cards (p-5 or p-6) to let content breathe, essential for multi-lingual text expansion.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Input/Controls: rounded-lg (8px). Main Cards: rounded-2xl (16px). Buttons/Badges: rounded-full (9999px).
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Use a mobile-first Bento grid approach. The two main categories (Single Window, Accounting) should be dominant 'Hero' cards (col-span-1, tall layout).
spacing_and_layout.borders: Rely on 1px solid borders (border-neutral-200) instead of heavy drop shadows to define surfaces. The aesthetic is tactile and crisp, not floaty.

buttons.primary: bg-[#0F4C3A] text-white rounded-full py-3.5 px-6 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center active:bg-[#0A3326] transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#0F4C3A] border border-[#0F4C3A] rounded-full py-3.5 px-6 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center active:bg-gray-50

inputs.default: border border-gray-300 rounded-lg p-4 bg-gray-50 text-slate-900 focus:border-[#0F4C3A] focus:bg-white text-base
inputs.label: text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-1.5 ml-1

cards.category_card: bg-white border border-gray-100 rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-sm active:border-[#15634D] active:bg-[#F8FAF9] flex flex-col justify-between overflow-hidden relative
cards.list_item: bg-white border-b border-gray-100 py-4 px-2 flex flex-row items-center justify-between active:bg-gray-50

file_upload.dropzone: border-2 border-dashed border-gray-300 rounded-xl p-8 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-[#F8FAF9] active:bg-[#EEF2F0]
file_upload.icon_container: bg-white p-3 rounded-full shadow-sm mb-3 text-[#0F4C3A]

bottom_nav.container: bg-white border-t border-gray-100 pb-safe pt-2 flex justify-around items-center h-16 sm:h-20

components.status_badge: px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold flex items-center

motion_and_interactions.buttons: Implement a subtle scale-down effect (0.97) on press using React Native Pressable/TouchableOpacity.
motion_and_interactions.screen_transitions: Standard smooth horizontal slide transitions. Avoid custom complex 3D routing to maintain a snappy, government-grade utility feel.
motion_and_interactions.feedback: Use haptic feedback (Haptics API) on successful form submission, document upload, and status changes.

onboarding_hero.description: Clean, abstract modern government architecture to establish trust.

category_accounting.description: Professional analyzing financial documents. Use as subtle background/header for the Accounting Services category.

category_single_window.description: People reviewing documents, illustrating collaborative service requests and document signing.

accessibility.contrast: All text over background must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1). The primary green (#0F4C3A) over white passes with 9.8:1.
accessibility.tap_targets: Minimum 48x48 logical pixels for all touchable elements.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include a 'testID' attribute (e.g., testID='login-submit-button') for automated testing.

instructions_to_main_agent: Since this is a React Native Expo app, implement these UI styles using standard StyleSheet or NativeWind. If using NativeWind, strictly follow the provided Tailwind tokens.
Multi-language support (Uzbek/Russian/English) is critical. Build UI to accommodate text expansion (Russian/Uzbek can be 30-50% longer than English).
Admin features should be accessible within the app for privileged users. Filter chips for status (Pending/Approved) should use the defined semantic colors.
For document uploads, use 'expo-document-picker'. The UI should visually indicate dashed dropzone rules and show successful file attachments cleanly with an icon and remove button.
Ensure the 'testID' attribute is applied consistently to inputs, buttons, and navigation tabs.
